unitName: 塔克：了不起的治療犬 | Tucker: an amazing therapy dog

article.title: Tucker: an amazing therapy dog 塔克：了不起的治療犬

paragraphs.english: Tucker is a chocolate Labradoodle. He started working as a therapy dog at Independent Schools Foundation Academy in 2019.
sentences: He started working as a therapy dog at Independent Schools Foundation Academy in 2019.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 塔克是一隻巧克力色的拉布拉多貴賓犬。他於2019年開始在弘立書院擔任治療犬。
translation_sentences: 🌐 塔克是一隻巧克力色的拉布拉多貴賓犬。
他於2019年開始在弘立書院擔任治療犬。

implication.english: 💡 The first paragraph introduces Tucker, his breed, and his job as a therapy dog at a specific school.
implication.chinese: 💡 第一段介紹了塔克、他的品種，以及他在特定學校擔任治療犬的工作。[換句話說]：塔克是一隻受過訓練的治療犬，從2019年開始在一所學校工作。

paragraphs.english: Therapy dogs give emotional support to students by providing comfort. Many students deal with exam worries, social challenges or problems at home. Tucker is a simple solution to these difficulties.
sentences: Therapy dogs give emotional support to students by providing comfort.
Many students deal with exam worries, social challenges or problems at home.
Tucker is a simple solution to these difficulties.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 治療犬透過提供安慰，給予學生情感上的支持。許多學生面臨考試焦慮、社交挑戰或家庭問題。塔克是這些困難的一個簡單解決方案。
translation_sentences: 🌐 治療犬透過提供安慰，給予學生情感上的支持。
許多學生面臨考試焦慮、社交挑戰或家庭問題。
塔克是這些困難的一個簡單解決方案。

implication.english: 💡 This paragraph explains the role of therapy dogs and the common problems students face, emphasizing Tucker's importance.
implication.chinese: 💡 這段說明了治療犬的角色以及學生常遇到的問題，強調塔克的重要性。[換句話說]：治療犬的工作就是安慰學生，幫助他們應對各種壓力，塔克正是為了解決這些問題而存在的。

paragraphs.english: Tucker is a wonderful companion for many students. When students feel anxious, they can visit Tucker and interact with him at break or lunch. They can pet him, give him treats or just cuddle with him. Some may play with Tucker to exercise him. Tucker even helped students overcome their fear of dogs. Some of Tucker's best friends are students who were scared to go near him at first.
sentences: Tucker is a wonderful companion for many students.
When students feel anxious, they can visit Tucker and interact with him at break or lunch.
They can pet him, give him treats or just cuddle with him.
Some may play with Tucker to exercise him.
Tucker even helped students overcome their fear of dogs.
Some of Tucker's best friends are students who were scared to go near him at first.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 對許多學生來說，塔克是一個很棒的夥伴。當學生感到焦慮時，他們可以在休息或午餐時間去拜訪塔克，和他互動。他們可以撫摸他、給他零食，或者只是擁抱他。有些人會和塔克玩耍，讓他運動。塔克甚至幫助學生克服了對狗的恐懼。塔克最好的朋友中，有些是一開始害怕接近他的學生。
translation_sentences: 🌐 對許多學生來說，塔克是一個很棒的夥伴。
當學生感到焦慮時，他們可以在休息或午餐時間去拜訪塔克，和他互動。
他們可以撫摸他、給他零食，或者只是擁抱他。
有些人會和塔克玩耍，讓他運動。
塔克甚至幫助學生克服了對狗的恐懼。
塔克最好的朋友中，有些是一開始害怕接近他的學生。

implication.english: 💡 This paragraph describes how students interact with Tucker and the various benefits, including reducing anxiety and overcoming fear.
implication.chinese: 💡 這段描述了學生如何與塔克互動以及各種好處，包括減少焦慮和克服恐懼。[換句話說]：學生可以隨時去找塔克，摸摸他、抱抱他，這些互動能讓他們放鬆心情，甚至幫助原本怕狗的學生不再害怕。

paragraphs.english: With a therapy dog around, students seem less stressed and have better attitudes. Now, more schools may get therapy dogs for their students.
sentences: With a therapy dog around, students seem less stressed and have better attitudes.
Now, more schools may get therapy dogs for their students.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 有治療犬在身邊，學生們似乎壓力較小，態度也更好。現在，可能有更多學校會為學生引進治療犬。
translation_sentences: 🌐 有治療犬在身邊，學生們似乎壓力較小，態度也更好。
現在，可能有更多學校會為學生引進治療犬。

implication.english: 💡 The conclusion highlights the positive impact of therapy dogs and the potential for wider adoption in schools.
implication.chinese: 💡 結論強調了治療犬的正面影響，以及更多學校可能跟進的趨勢。[換句話說]：塔克的效果很好，所以其他學校也可能會開始引進治療犬來幫助學生。
